update_history: 2026-05-27: initial version (E1 confirmatory family + cost ladder + bootstrap params)
2026-05-27-a: added historical_exploratory_trials block + spa_scope_clarification per Codex Touchpoint 3 Round A-bis CODEX-RR-E1E6-A-bis-06 MAJOR

primary_storya_trials.description: Post-E1 confirmatory family — SPA + DM/HLN + bootstrap CI + cost ladder applied here ONLY

ablation_storya_trials.description: E3 and E4-alpha edge-ablation families; will be added to SPA family ONLY for the edge-ablation-specific question (NOT pooled with primary E1)

historical_exploratory_trials.description: Pre-Story-A exploratory analyses that informed Universe C composition + horizon selection + loss function choice. NOT controlled by post-E1 SPA. Disclosed for transparency per Codex Touchpoint 3 Round A-bis CODEX-RR-E1E6-A-bis-06 MAJOR.

plan_aaa_group_ranking.test_method: Group permutation Δ-IC vs baseline with NW-HAC SE + BH-FDR q=0.05
plan_aaa_group_ranking.headline_result: 0/61 groups pass BH-FDR at q=0.05; 1/61 (CORD20+1) FDR-rejected in NEGATIVE direction
plan_aaa_group_ranking.informs_storya: Universe C composition (51 features = top-15 group members) derives from this ranking; ranking step had same-day OHLC leak (Plan AAA §1.9 caveat #5) — paper §Limitations qualifies

horizon_ablation.informs_storya: 21d horizon selection (Story A locked) — informed by Plan AAA results + this ablation showing 21d sweet spot for cross-sectional ranking

loss_horserace_phase5_step3.informs_storya: MSE loss locked for Story A E1; ListMLE fold-4 catastrophic collapse documented in docs/analysis.md 2026-04-27-b — informed Story A decision to focus on MSE+rank IC reporting, NOT learning-to-rank losses

total_exploratory_units.note: Counts are heterogeneous (group-level test vs per-cell IC) — sum reported for upper-bound transparency only; should NOT be entered into a single multi-testing correction (different nulls per family)

spa_application.benchmark: LightGBM (per universe; joint uses per-universe LGB pooled)
spa_application.seed_aggregation_policy: Seeds averaged per (model, universe, date, fold) BEFORE SPA (T=313 per fold-pool) — consistent with DM/HLN treatment per Codex Round D D-04. Treating each (model, seed) as independent SPA candidate is FORBIDDEN.

dm_hln_application.small_sample_correction: HLN 1997 with h=21, T=313, correction factor ≈ 0.935

block_bootstrap.rationale: block_size = horizon to capture intra-label autocorrelation (21d overlapping labels)

spa_scope_clarification: SPA controls familywise error over the POST-E1 CONFIRMATORY family ONLY (M=3 candidates per universe vs LGB benchmark; M=6 joint). It does NOT control familywise error over the broader project research path (Plan AAA 61 group-level tests, horizon ablation 360 cells, loss horserace 600 cells). Per Codex Round A-bis CODEX-RR-E1E6-A-bis-06: reviewers should treat post-E1 SPA non-rejection (p_consistent = 0.147 / 0.589 / 0.281 for B / C / joint) as evidence that the four pre-registered confirmatory candidates do not significantly beat LightGBM within their own family. The historical exploratory trials are disclosed for transparency but explicitly NOT in the SPA family — their role was hypothesis generation (which universe / which horizon / which loss), not confirmatory testing.
